title: TeraWulf Inc (WULF) Receives a Rating Update from a Top Analyst
text: TeraWulf received multiple analyst rating updates in May 2026 reflecting growing confidence in the company's business transformation. Citizens Capital raised the firm's price target on TeraWulf (WULF) to $32 from $22 and maintains an Outperform rating on the shares. This $10 per share increase represents approximately 45% upside from certain price levels and reflects analyst expectations for strong HPC revenue growth. The upgrade came following strong Q1 2026 results showing that HPC revenue for the first time exceeded Bitcoin mining revenue. Analysts cited the stability of contracted HPC leases, particularly the multi-billion dollar agreements with Fluidstack and Core42, as key drivers of the positive outlook. The consensus among top-tier analysts has shifted strongly bullish on TeraWulf's AI compute strategy.
